description.ko: 에메랄드빛 이끼와 황금빛 과즙이 투명한 세포막을 통해 흐르는 유기적 호흡의 깊은 탐구.
description.en: A deep exploration of organic respiration where emerald moss and golden nectar flow through translucent cellular membranes.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Celestial Alveoli.' A microscopic landscape of #7FB069 emerald moss-membranes and #2D5A3D forest vascular filaments pulsating within a #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid atmosphere. Flowing ribbons of #FFE66D golden nectar move like viscous silk through semi-permeable cellular walls. Macro focus on translucent textures and internal capillary systems. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics and extreme soft focus bokeh, 8k resolution.
